profile.name: Kelvin Maina
profile.title: Graphic Designer & SEO Copywriter | Crafting Visuals and Words that Convert
profile.bio: Hi! I'm Kelvin Maina, a passionate Graphic Designer and SEO Copywriter dedicated to creating impactful visuals and compelling content. With a Bachelor's degree in Community Development from The Cooperative University of Kenya, I bring a unique perspective to design and communication. I specialize in creating brand identities, marketing materials, and content that resonates with target audiences and drives engagement.
